description_long: This object is a large, mechanical, spider-like rifle platform with four articulated legs and a robust, armored body. The main body is rectangular and features two prominent cylindrical tanks at the rear, likely for fuel or compressed gas, and is covered in a worn, military green finish with visible scuff marks and bullet impacts. Two long, parallel barrels extend from the front, flanked by additional mechanical appendages and reinforced plating, suggesting heavy firepower and durability. The legs are jointed and appear to be made of metal, designed for stability and movement across urban terrain. Various mechanical details, such as bolts, hinges, and exhaust pipes, are visible, giving the object an industrial, utilitarian appearance. The overall design suggests a weaponized autonomous or remotely operated platform intended for urban combat or defense.
description: A large, spider-like mechanical rifle platform with dual barrels, armored plating, and four articulated metal legs, finished in military green with visible wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dual barrels, articulated legs, and cylindrical tank on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the two large cylindrical tanks and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the left-side tank and the mechanical leg structure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the twin barrels, armored faceplate, and the full spread of the four legs.
